home.emergencySubtitle: Live employee data — contracts · visas · probation
home.iqamaExpiryHint: Non-Saudi only — within 30 days of expiry
home.emergencyTabDescription: Grouped by document type: annual contract renewals (within 90 days), non-Saudi iqama expiry (within 30 days), work permits (within 45 days), and probation endings (last 10 days of the 80-day period from hire date). Each column shows only employees affected in that category.
home.importantAlertsTabDescription: A unified list of all alerts sorted by priority: an Urgent section for cases with 7 days or less remaining, and a This month section for other upcoming alerts. Helps you act quickly without switching between columns.
home.probationEndingHint: Last 10 days of 80-day probation from hire date

accountDeletion.buttonHint: Request full removal of your account and data from the system after 30 days
accountDeletion.title: Delete account
accountDeletion.step1Message: Are you sure you want to request account deletion? Your account and all associated data will be fully removed from the system and databases 30 days after the request date. This cannot be undone once the final deletion is executed.
accountDeletion.step2Message: To confirm the deletion request, type DELETE. Once confirmed, your request will be recorded and your account will be fully removed after 30 days.
accountDeletion.successMessage: Your account deletion request has been received. Your account and data will be fully removed from the system after 30 days.
accountDeletion.error: Could not submit the account deletion request.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.description: Manage your current plan and upgrade features.
subscription.upgradeDescription: Compare tiers and pick what fits your organization. TapPayment integration coming soon.

termsModal.title: Terms of use
termsModal.bodyEn: The full terms of use are available in Arabic. Switch the interface language to Arabic to read the agreement.

postSubscription.title: After subscription
postSubscription.subtitle: A quick start guide after activating your account — before the mobile apps launch.

steps.title: Customize the system first
steps.body: Start with System customization to set leave, payroll, attendance, loans, and performance policies. This ensures payroll, requests, and reports match your organization from day one.

steps.title: Bulk-import your team
steps.body: On the Employees page, use Bulk import and upload an Excel/CSV file. Invitations are not sent automatically — you can finish setup and review data calmly.

steps.title: Coordinate mobile app launch with support
steps.body: Employee mobile apps are launching soon. Contact support to confirm the official launch date, then use Send invitations on the Employees page so your team can sign in by email.

postSubscription.noteBody: Hold off on sending employee login invitations until iOS and Android apps are officially released. Until then, manage employees, payroll, and requests from the web manager dashboard.

systemCustomization.title: System customization
systemCustomization.subtitle: Configure company policies — leave, payroll, attendance, and performance

hints.salaryPayDay: Day 27 is recommended for WPS compliance
hints.sickLeave: Per Saudi Labor Law — up to 120 days per year

sections.payrollHint: Payroll, GOSI, allowances, and employee loans
